economic_notes: Multiple commercial enterprises accounted for by modified equity method including forestry, sawmill, economic development, telecom, gas, and retail operations. Entities include Club Odanak, multiple numbered companies, Services Forestiers Atikamekw Aski, Scierie Tackipotcikan, Développement économique Nictamitakok, Comptoir Atowkinatok, Manouane Sipi, Services Télécommunications Wemotaci, Wemogaz, Société de Télécommunications Atikamekw-Cri, Pierre Naud/Mokotakan.
notes: Qualified audit opinion due to non-compliance with SP 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations standard applicable since April 1, 2022 - ARO liabilities not identified or recorded for fiscal years ended March 31, 2024 and 2023. Prior year corrections of $492,389 (2024) and $758,361 (2023) recorded. Combined financial statements include Operating Fund, Housing Enterprise Committee Fund, Credit Union Enterprise Fund, Economic Development Fund, Community Fund, and Mictikw Coria Trust. 19 entities accounted for by modified equity method. Tangible capital assets include $72,150,623 general + $3,042,391 housing fund. ISC receivables $12,885,223 from balance sheet note 5. Total government transfers not separately disclosed in summary statements - segment data at page 28 not provided in extracted pages. Deferred revenue $26,269,295 is significant. Bank borrowings of $380,000 new in 2024. Long-term debt proceeds $2,259,807 in year.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
